default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Andrew Rusis (Denali Growth Partners) to discuss potential investment in fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital has built a highly efficient, AI-powered content creation platform with strong market traction (\~$4.6M ARR, 67-71% gross margins)](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Company seeking $10-15M investment to scale engineering team and underlying AI infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Denali interested in AI/data companies, flexible on valuation, focuses on future potential](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Denali Growth Partners Overview

  - [Founded 3 years ago, raised $200M first fund, now raising fund 2](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Seek capital-efficient companies with strong leadership and growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Typically minority equity investors to support founder vision](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Offer growth capital, liquidity options, and network of 40+ entrepreneur advisors](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### fwd.digital Business Model

  - [Two-part business: 1) Content creation service ("money printing machine")](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - 2)  Underlying AI infrastructure being built to support and scale operations
  - [Leverages AI + human experts to produce high-quality content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Strong product-market fit: 29-30 out of 30 prospects close within 1-2 30-min meetings](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Market Opportunity

  - [Content marketing/services market estimated at hundreds of billions annually](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [25,000 companies paying $10-40K/year for SEMrush (potential customers)](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [fwd.digital extracting $9-12K/month from seed to public companies](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Growth Metrics

  - [Current ARR: $4.6M (up from $4.3M days prior)](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Projecting $6M ARR by end of February](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Q4 metrics: 71% gross margin, 28% net retention](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Strong sales pipeline: $5.8M, with many deals closing rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

### Technology Vision

  - [Building paradigm-shifting "infrastructure as code" for knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Modular, API-driven components for content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Runtime layer to deploy/scale thousands of parallel processes](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Network of human experts to guide/improve AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

### Fundraising Goals

  - [Seeking $10-15M investment](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Primarily to invest in engineering talent and AI infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Not for scaling existing content business operations](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel presenting to Madrona Venture Group on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Andrew to schedule follow-up call next week including Denali founding partner](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Denali to provide more info on their valuation approach for AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [fwd.digital to share additional financial/business data as discussions progress](https://fathom.video/share/VH8GKsJhtiMHpdwa-Ykq-rnKyJXkRPpb?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

action_items.description: Prepare info on Denali's company valuation approach for Marcel
Send Marcel available time slots for next week's meeting
Loop in VP & founding partner for next meeting w/ Marcel
